ALEX MORGAN
Portland, OR | alex@example.com | linkedin.com/in/alexmorgan

SUMMARY
Senior DevOps/SRE engineer with 15+ years of experience building and operating
large-scale distributed systems. Expert in Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, and CI/CD
automation. Proven track record leading platform teams and driving reliability
initiatives across cloud-native environments.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Site Reliability Engineer — Acme Corp (2018–present)
- Architected multi-region Kubernetes clusters serving 500M+ requests/day
- Reduced MTTR by 60% by implementing distributed tracing (Jaeger, OpenTelemetry)
- Led migration from on-prem to AWS; saved $2M/year in infrastructure costs
- Built GitOps pipelines (ArgoCD, Flux) for 40+ microservices

Staff DevOps Engineer — WidgetCo (2014–2018)
- Designed Terraform modules for repeatable infrastructure provisioning on AWS and GCP
- Implemented SLO/SLI framework using Prometheus and Grafana; achieved 99.95% uptime
- Created automated incident response runbooks, reducing on-call load by 40%

DevOps Engineer — StartupXYZ (2010–2014)
- Built CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins, later migrated to GitHub Actions
- Managed Linux servers (Ubuntu, RHEL) for production and staging environments

SKILLS
Cloud: AWS (EKS, EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, CloudWatch), GCP, Azure
Container/Orchestration: Kubernetes, Docker, Helm, Kustomize
IaC: Terraform, Ansible, CloudFormation, Pulumi
CI/CD: GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Flux, Jenkins, GitLab CI
Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, Jaeger, OpenTelemetry, PagerDuty
Languages: Python, Bash, Go (proficient)
Other: Linux, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Vault, Consul

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science — Oregon State University
